Our Services

Real work, real results — see what we've done for homeowners across the Kansas City Metro Area.

🏠
Outdoor Excellence
Exterior Painting
Boost curb appeal and protect your home from the elements with our expert exterior painting services.

Complete House Exterior Painting

We transform the outside of your home with meticulous surface preparation, premium paints, and flawless finishing — protecting it for years to come while dramatically improving curb appeal.

  • Full surface prep: scraping, sanding, caulking, priming
  • Siding, trim, shutters, soffit, and fascia
  • Doors, garage doors, and porches
  • Premium exterior paints (Sherwin-Williams / Benjamin Moore)
  • Weather and UV protection coatings
  • Cleanup and final walkthrough included
📋 Get a Free Quote

Deck & Fence Painting / Staining

Restore your outdoor living space to its former beauty. We use moisture-resistant products designed to withstand Kansas City's climate — like this beautiful two-story deck we completed recently.

  • Power washing and thorough surface prep
  • Staining, painting, or solid color coating
  • UV-resistant sealants for lasting protection
  • Fences, pergolas, railings, and gazebos
  • Restoration of weathered or grayed wood
📋 Get a Free Quote
🎨
Interior Transformation
Interior Painting
Create the atmosphere you've always envisioned — from elegant living rooms to showroom-ready kitchens.

Interior Room Painting

From elegant living rooms with crown molding to cozy bedrooms, our team delivers clean, precise, and stunning interior finishes. Every surface is treated with the care it deserves.

  • Walls, ceilings, and accent features
  • Crown molding, trim, and baseboards
  • Feature walls and custom color matching
  • Scrubbable, washable premium finishes
  • Full furniture protection and cleanup
📋 Get a Free Quote

Kitchen & Cabinet Painting

Give your kitchen a complete makeover at a fraction of the cost of replacement. Our multi-step process delivers a factory-quality, smooth finish on cabinets and walls that lasts for years.

  • Full degreasing and sanding of all surfaces
  • Professional-grade primer application
  • Sprayed or brush/roll finish — your choice
  • Kitchen, bathroom & laundry room cabinets
  • Any color — whites, grays, bold tones
  • Hardware removal and reinstallation
📋 Get a Free Quote
